label: Trainable
description: Defines one trainable command for animals, such as Tameness, Obedience, or Release. Referenced by PawnColumnDef.trainable for generated trainable columns.

difficulty.label: Difficulty
difficulty.description: Training difficulty. Higher values require more training sessions. Must be set (default -1 triggers a config error).

minBodySize.label: Min body size
minBodySize.description: Minimum body size of an animal before this training step becomes available.

prerequisites.label: Prerequisites
prerequisites.description: TrainableDefs that must be completed before this training step can begin.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Free-form string tags used to match this trainable from other defs or filters.

defaultTrainable.label: Default trainable
defaultTrainable.description: If true, this training step is active by default for newly tamed animals.

requiredTrainability.label: Required trainability
requiredTrainability.description: TrainabilityDef that an animal must have before this training step is available.

steps.label: Steps
steps.description: Number of training sessions required to complete this trainable. Default 1.

listPriority.label: List priority
listPriority.description: Sort order in the trainable list UI. Higher values appear earlier.

icon.label: Icon
icon.description: Texture content path for the icon shown in the trainable column header. Not a def reference.

specialTrainable.label: Special trainable
specialTrainable.description: If true, this trainable is handled specially by the training system and is not shown in the normal training UI (e.g. Release).
